falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a blowoff top scenario rather than a bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
